---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new — start with the use case, not the solution
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Use case

<!--
What are you actually trying to do?
"I want to be able to X so that Y" beats "the app should have a button for X".
A clear use case helps the maintainer pick the right shape for the solution.
-->

## What's currently painful

<!-- What workaround are you using today? What's the cost? -->

## Proposed solution (optional)

<!-- If you already have a shape in mind, describe it. Otherwise leave blank. -->

## Who else does it well?

<!-- Links to screenshots or other tools that nail this UX. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Edge cases, related issues, willingness to send a PR. -->
